title: Vaccination Records | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:

Nationally, 57.8 million U.S. adults aged 19 years or older participated in an IIS in 2012. 4 This number reflects adults who may have had childhood vaccines entered during childhood and now have aged to adults. In 2013, 32% of U.S. adults had a record in the IIS and at least one vaccination administered during adulthood.
